jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - CarDekho - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
CarDekho invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Nashik location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About CarDekho:
CarDekho is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CarDekho!
